## Getting Started

### Logging In
1. Navigate to the Staff Portal URL
2. Enter your email address and password
3. **Remember Me**: Check this box if you're on a personal device to stay logged in
   - Leave unchecked on shared computers for automatic logout when browser closes
4. Click **Sign In**

### Setting Your Status
Once logged in, set your availability status in the sidebar:
- **Available** (Green): Ready to take calls and chats
- **Busy** (Yellow): Currently occupied, limited availability
- **Off Duty** (Grey): Not accepting new requests

> **Note**: If you see "Status updates disabled - no profile linked", contact an administrator to link your staff profile.

### Sound Notifications
Toggle sound alerts on/off using the **Sound On/Off** button in the sidebar footer.

---

## Dashboard

The Dashboard provides an at-a-glance view of your workload:

### Key Metrics
- **Active Alerts**: Safeguarding and panic alerts requiring attention
- **Waiting Chats**: Veterans waiting for live support
- **Open Cases**: Your assigned cases
- **Pending Callbacks**: Callback requests awaiting action

### Panic Button (Peer Supporters Only)
If you're a peer supporter and need immediate counsellor assistance:
1. Click the red **Need Help? Trigger Panic Alert** button
2. Optionally describe the situation
3. Click **Send Alert**

All available counsellors will be immediately notified.

---

## Alerts

### Safeguarding Alerts
Monitor and respond to AI-detected safeguarding concerns:

| Risk Level | Description | Response Time |
|------------|-------------|---------------|
| **Critical** | Immediate risk to life | Respond immediately |
| **High** | Significant concern | Respond within 15 mins |
| **Medium** | Moderate concern | Respond within 1 hour |
| **Low** | Minor concern | Review within shift |

### Alert Actions
- **Acknowledge**: Mark that you're reviewing the alert
- **Resolve**: Close the alert with notes on action taken
- **Escalate**: Send to supervisor for guidance

### Panic Alerts
Staff-triggered panic alerts appear with a red "PANIC" badge. These require immediate attention.

### Calling Veterans from Alerts
For critical safeguarding alerts, you can call the veteran directly:
1. Click the alert to view details
2. Click **Call Now** button (if available)
3. The Twilio dialler will connect you

---

## Live Support (Chat)

### Monitoring Chat Queue
- View all waiting veterans in the queue
- Risk levels are colour-coded (RED, AMBER, GREEN)
- Higher risk veterans should be prioritised

### Accepting a Chat
1. Click **Accept** on a waiting chat
2. The chat window opens
3. Begin your conversation with the veteran

### During Chat
- Type messages in the input field and press Enter or click Send
- View veteran's previous messages and AI conversation history
- Risk indicators show current assessment

### Ending Chat
1. Provide closure to the conversation
2. Click **End Chat**
3. Add session notes if required

### Safeguarding During Chat
If you identify safeguarding concerns:
1. Click the **Flag Safeguarding** button
2. Select the risk level
3. Add notes explaining the concern
4. The system will create a safeguarding alert

---

## Cases

### Case Overview
Cases track ongoing support relationships with veterans.

### Case Statuses
- **Open**: Active case requiring attention
- **In Progress**: Currently being worked on
- **Pending**: Awaiting veteran response or external action
- **Closed**: Resolved case

### Creating a Case
1. Click **New Case**
2. Enter veteran details and description
3. Set initial status and priority
4. Click **Create**

### Managing Cases
- **View Details**: Click on a case to see full history
- **Add Notes**: Document interactions and progress
- **Update Status**: Change status as case progresses
- **Assign**: Transfer case to another staff member

---

## Callbacks

### Callback Queue
View and manage callback requests from veterans.

### Sub-tabs
- **Pending**: Requests waiting to be taken
- **Active (Taken)**: Callbacks you've accepted
- **Completed**: Finished callbacks

### Taking a Callback
1. Click **Take** on a pending callback
2. The callback moves to your active list
3. Click **Call Now** to dial the veteran
4. Use the call controls (Mute, Hang Up)
5. Click **Complete** when finished

### Releasing a Callback
If you can't complete a callback:
1. Click **Release** on your active callback
2. It returns to the pending queue for others

---

## Rota (Shift Management)

### Calendar View
- Green dots indicate days with scheduled shifts
- Click a date to view shifts for that day
- Today is highlighted with a border

### Adding a Shift
1. Click **Add Shift**
2. Select the date
3. Set start and end times
4. Choose shift type (Morning/Afternoon/Evening/Night)
5. Click **Add Shift**

### Managing Shifts
- **Request Swap**: Ask to swap a shift with a colleague
- **Delete**: Remove a shift (with confirmation)

### Swap Requests
View the status of your swap requests:
- **Pending**: Awaiting approval
- **Approved**: Swap confirmed
- **Rejected**: Swap declined

---

## Team

### Team On Duty
View all staff currently on shift:
- Name and role (Counsellor/Peer Supporter)
- Status indicator (Available/Busy/Offline)

### Calling Team Members
If you need to speak with a colleague:
1. Find them in the Team list
2. Click the **Phone** icon next to their name
3. The in-app calling feature will connect you

### Team Stats
Quick overview of team availability:
- Available count
- Busy count
- Offline count

---

## Notes

### My Notes
Personal notes visible only to you.

### Shared Notes
Notes shared with the team.

### Creating a Note
1. Click **New Note**
2. Enter a title
3. Write your content
4. Check **Share with team** if you want others to see it
5. Click **Save Note**

### Managing Notes
- **Edit**: Modify your own notes
- **Share**: Share a note with specific team members
- **Delete**: Remove notes you created

---

## Supervision (Supervisors Only)

This tab is only visible to users with supervisor privileges.

### Escalations
View and manage escalated cases:
- **Pending**: Awaiting supervisor review
- **Acknowledged**: Under review
- **Resolved**: Handled

### Managing Escalations
1. Review the escalation details and reason
2. Click **Acknowledge** to indicate you're reviewing
3. Take appropriate action
4. Click **Resolve** when complete

---

## Internal Messages

### Accessing Messages
Click **Messages** in the sidebar footer.

### Sending a Message
1. Select a recipient from the dropdown
2. Type your message
3. Click Send or press Enter

### Reading Messages
- Unread messages have a blue left border
- Click on an unread message to mark it as read
- Messages from you appear on the right
- Messages to you appear on the left

---

## Troubleshooting

### Connection Issues
If you see "Connection Issue" warning:
1. Close any other Staff Portal tabs
2. Refresh the page
3. If issue persists, contact IT support

### No Profile Linked
If you see warnings about no profile:
- Contact an administrator to link your staff profile
- Some features will be limited until this is resolved

### Session Timeout
- You'll be warned 5 minutes before automatic logout
- Click **Stay Logged In** to continue working
- Sessions automatically end after 2 hours of inactivity

### Audio/Call Issues
If calls aren't working:
1. Check your browser has microphone permissions
2. Ensure you're not muted
3. Try refreshing the page
4. Contact IT if issues persist

---

## Quick Reference

### Keyboard Shortcuts
- **Enter**: Send chat message
- **Tab**: Navigate between form fields

### Status Colours
| Colour | Meaning |
|--------|---------|
| Green | Available/Active/Low Risk |
| Yellow/Amber | Busy/Medium Risk |
| Red | Critical/High Risk |
| Grey | Offline/Unavailable |

### Support
For technical issues, contact your IT administrator or supervisor.
